title: dcg-vy2.1
description:
Fix the subcommand evasion detection for infra/cloud commands with global flags before the subcommand:
- aws --profile prod terminate-instances --instance-ids i-abc123 (global flag --profile before subcommand)
- gcloud --project prod-project projects delete my-project (global flag --project before subcommand)

The parser/matcher needs to handle these patterns where flags appear before the destructive subcommand. Fix in internal/packs/cloud/ or internal/parse/ as appropriate. Add test cases and update golden files.

After fixing, run: go test ./e2etest -run TestSecuritySubcommandEvasion -count=1
